title: Microsoft’s new AI models & bots dominate the internet
summary: A Cloudflare study shows agentic AI bots generate 57.4% of web requests globally. The Mixture of Experts podcast panel debates whether this represents a fundamental shift in web interaction or a continuation of existing bot dominance patterns.
